Vignette for the eurostat R package

2026-03-10

Source: vignettes/vignette.Rmd
vignette.Rmd

Installation

Release version (CRAN):

install.packages("eurostat")

Development version (Github):

library(remotes)
remotes::install_github("ropengov/eurostat")

Load the package:

For more detailed examples on how to use the package, see the online tutorial.

On this page

Developed by Leo Lahti, Janne Huovari, Markus Kainu, Przemyslaw Biecek.
